8:["$","p",null,{"children":["The scratchpad stores a single mutable string per bank. Calling ",["$","code",null,{"children":"scratchpad_write"}]," replaces it. No history — it's a sticky note, not a log."]}]
9:["$","$L6",null,{"as":"h2","children":"API"}]

b:["$","$L17",null,{"code":"# Write a note\nmnemosyne_scratchpad_write(content=\"User's name is Alice, works at Acme Corp\")\n\n# Read it back\nmnemosyne_scratchpad_read()\n# Returns: \"User's name is Alice, works at Acme Corp\"\n\n# Clear when done\nmnemosyne_scratchpad_clear()\n","language":"bash"}]
